hooks.command: cmd=$(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); case " $cmd " in *" git commit "*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; if [ -f .pre-commit-config.yaml ] && command -v pre-commit >/dev/null 2>&1; then pre-commit run --hook-stage pre-commit 1>&2 || exit 2; else echo "[commit-gate] pre-commit config/binary not ready; skipping style check (will activate after m1-power-on)." >&2; fi; exit 0
